message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the centre and should be in the expensive price range
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 6 people at 13:30 on tuesday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 3 and should include free parking
The hotel should be in the same area as the restaurant and should be in the same price range as the restaurant
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 3 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
